name: User tries payment with nodoInviaRPT until activatePaymentNoticeV2, then retries again the flow but fails
fullName: User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT: User tries payment with nodoInviaRPT until activatePaymentNoticeV2, then retries again the flow but fails

steps.name: Given a single RPT of type BBT with 1 transfers of which 0 are stamps
When the execution of "Send a nodoInviaRPT request" was successful

attachments.name: Step: [the user sends a nodoInviaRPT action] - Sent request
Step: [the user sends a nodoInviaRPT action] - Received response

steps.name: Then the execution of "Execute NM1-to-NMU conversion in wisp-converter" was successful
And the execution of "Retrieve all related notice numbers from executed redirect" was successful

attachments.name: Step: [the user searches for flow steps by IUVs]: on IUV: [471513626608244] - Received response

steps.name: And the execution of "Send a checkPosition request" was successful

Step: [the creditor institution sends a checkPosition action] - Received response

steps.name: And the execution of "Send one or more activatePaymentNoticeV2 request" was successful

Step: [the creditor institution sends a activatePaymentNoticeV2 action] - Received response

steps.name: And the execution of "Fails on execute NM1-to-NMU conversion in wisp-converter" was successful
